hero.subtitle: We build production-grade AI infrastructure that captures, scales, and operationalizes expert knowledge across your organization.

services.heading: End-to-end AI capabilities
services.subtitle: From strategy to production. We design, build, and operate AI systems that solve real problems.
services.consultingDesc: Actionable roadmaps for AI adoption. We assess your operations, identify high-impact opportunities, and design implementation strategies that deliver measurable ROI.
services.agentsDesc: Autonomous agents that execute multi-step workflows, make decisions within defined guardrails, and integrate with your existing systems.
services.skillsDesc: Custom AI capabilities built for your domain. We encode your processes, standards, and decision frameworks into reusable AI skill modules.
services.infraDesc: Scalable, secure, production-grade infrastructure for AI deployment. From model serving to monitoring, built with DevSecOps principles.
services.ragDesc: Retrieval-Augmented Generation pipelines that ground AI responses in your organization's actual data, documents, and institutional knowledge.

coreProduct.description: An AI layer that augments your engineering experts. Capture what they know, make it reusable across teams, and ensure every response is reliable, traceable, and aligned with proven expertise.
coreProduct.captureDesc: Automatically extract and structure expert knowledge from projects, decisions, and technical discussions.
coreProduct.consistentDesc: Ensure every team member has access to the same quality of analysis and decision-making frameworks.
coreProduct.decisionDesc: AI-assisted analysis grounded in your organization's historical data, standards, and proven methodologies.
coreProduct.scaleDesc: Multiply your best engineers' impact. Expert-level thinking available to every team, every project, every decision.

howItWorks.heading: How it works
howItWorks.subtitle: A proven methodology for turning expert knowledge into scalable AI systems.
howItWorks.mapDesc: We analyze your domain, processes, and expert knowledge to identify what to capture and systematize.
howItWorks.buildDesc: We architect AI systems tailored to your workflows — agents, skills, knowledge pipelines, and integrations.
howItWorks.deployDesc: Production-grade deployment with security, monitoring, and observability built in from day one.
howItWorks.scaleDesc: Expand across teams and use cases. Continuous learning ensures the system improves with every interaction.

whyUs.heading: Built different
whyUs.subtitle: We combine deep AI expertise with engineering discipline. The result: AI systems you can actually trust in production.
whyUs.standardsDesc: We build AI systems the way critical infrastructure is built: tested, documented, version-controlled, and auditable.
whyUs.securityDesc: Every AI decision is logged, traceable, and explainable. Full audit trails for compliance-sensitive environments.
whyUs.devopsDesc: CI/CD pipelines, infrastructure as code, automated testing, and security scanning baked into every AI deployment.
whyUs.productionDesc: Not prototypes. Not demos. We ship AI systems that run in production, handle edge cases, and scale under load.
whyUs.reliableDesc: Responses grounded in your data, your standards, your expertise. No hallucinations. No generic outputs.
whyUs.domainDesc: We don't bolt generic AI onto your workflow. We build AI that understands your domain from the ground up.

callToAction.description: Book a discovery call with our engineering team. We'll assess your needs and show you exactly how AI can transform your operations.
callToAction.labelMessage: What are you looking to build?
callToAction.placeholderMessage: Brief description of your AI needs...
callToAction.successMessage: Our team will reach out within 24 hours to schedule your discovery call.
callToAction.disclaimer: No commitment required. We respond within 24 hours.
callToAction.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

footer.brandDescription: Production-grade AI systems built with engineering discipline. We turn expert knowledge into scalable intelligence.

chat.welcomeMessage: Hi! I'm Honto's AI assistant. I can answer questions about our services, how we work, or help you book a demo. What would you like to know?
chat.responseServices:
We offer five core services:

**AI Consulting & Strategy** — Roadmaps for AI adoption with measurable ROI.
**AI Agents** — Autonomous workflows that integrate with your systems.
**Domain-Specific AI Skills** — Custom AI capabilities for your exact processes.
**AI Infrastructure** — Scalable, secure deployment with DevSecOps.
**RAG & Knowledge Systems** — AI grounded in your organization's actual data.

Would you like to dive deeper into any of these?
chat.responseBooking:
I'd be happy to help you book a demo! You can use the scheduling section below, or I can connect you directly with our team.

Just share your **name**, **company**, and **preferred time**, and we'll get back to you within 24 hours.
chat.responseProcess:
Our process has four phases:

**1. Map** — We analyze your domain expertise and workflows.
**2. Build** — We architect AI systems tailored to your needs.
**3. Deploy** — Production-grade deployment with security built in.
**4. Scale** — Expand across teams with continuous improvement.

Every engagement starts with a discovery session. Want to schedule one?
chat.responseProduct:
Our **Expert Intelligence Platform** is an AI layer that augments your engineering experts. It captures institutional knowledge, makes it reusable, and ensures every AI response is reliable, traceable, and aligned with your proven expertise.

Think of it as giving every team member access to your best engineer's thinking.
chat.responseSecurity:
Security is foundational, not an afterthought:

- Full audit trails for every AI decision
- DevSecOps pipelines with automated security scanning
- Infrastructure as code with hardened configurations
- Compliance-ready logging and traceability

We build AI systems the way critical infrastructure is built.
chat.responsePricing:
Pricing depends on scope, complexity, and integration requirements. We work on both project-based and retainer models.

The best way to get accurate pricing is to **book a discovery call** where we can understand your specific needs. Shall I help set that up?
chat.responseFallback:
That's a great question. For the most detailed answer, I'd recommend speaking with one of our AI engineers directly.

Would you like to **book a demo** or learn more about our **services** or **process**?

caseStudiesPage.heading: Systems we've built
caseStudiesPage.subtitle: Real-world AI infrastructure designed for production. Each project represents our commitment to engineering-grade standards, security, and operational excellence.
caseStudiesPage.bulwarkSubtitle: Open-source governance layer for AI agents
caseStudiesPage.bulwarkDescription: A security-first middleware that sits between AI agents and external tools — enforcing policies, managing credentials, inspecting content, and maintaining tamper-evident audit trails.
caseStudiesPage.engramSubtitle: Knowledge compiler and query engine for AI agent memory
caseStudiesPage.engramDescription: A knowledge compiler that transforms Markdown files into a BM25-searchable index with multi-tier caching, causal graph traversal, temporal queries, and governance controls — giving AI agents persistent, structured memory.

bulwark.title: Bulwark
bulwark.subtitle: Open-source governance layer for AI agents
bulwark.description: AI agents are powerful but ungoverned. They can access any tool, leak any credential, and leave no audit trail. Bulwark sits between AI agents and external tools — enforcing policies, managing credentials, inspecting content, and maintaining a complete, tamper-evident audit trail. One policy governs all your agents.
bulwark.challengeDescription: When AI agents interact with payment processors, compliance systems, privacy-sensitive APIs, and regulated infrastructure, the stakes are existential. A single leaked credential or unauthorized API call can trigger regulatory violations, data breaches, and financial loss.
bulwark.problemCredentialDetail: Agents receive raw API keys and tokens, with no boundary between access and exposure.
bulwark.problemPolicyDetail: Every agent has implicit access to every tool. No per-agent, per-session, or per-operator controls.
bulwark.problemContentDetail: Sensitive data flows through agent pipelines unscanned — PII, secrets, and injection attacks pass unchecked.
bulwark.problemAuditDetail: When something goes wrong, there is no verifiable record of what happened, when, or why.
bulwark.capabilitiesSubtitle: Every request passes through a multi-stage pipeline. Each layer enforces a different security boundary.
bulwark.capPolicyDesc: YAML-based rules control which tools agents can use. Glob patterns, scope-based precedence (global/operator/session), priority ordering, and hot-reload without restart.
bulwark.capCredentialDesc: Agents never see real secrets. Bulwark injects credentials at the last mile before tool invocation. Encrypted at rest using age encryption.
bulwark.capInspectionDesc: 13 built-in detection patterns scan for AWS keys, GitHub tokens, private keys, PII, and prompt injection. Automatic blocking or redaction.
bulwark.capAuditDesc: Every action recorded in a tamper-evident SQLite database with Blake3 hash chains. Real-time tailing, search, export, and cryptographic verification.
bulwark.capRateLimitDesc: Token-bucket rate limits per session, operator, tool, or globally. Cost tracking with budget enforcement to prevent runaway spending.
bulwark.capMcpDesc: Works as an MCP gateway (stdio or HTTP) or HTTP forward proxy. Governance metadata attached to every tool call response.
bulwark.architectureSubtitle: Every agent interaction flows through a deterministic, auditable pipeline before reaching upstream tools.
bulwark.pipelineResponseNote: Response path mirrors the pipeline in reverse — content inspection and audit logging on every response.
bulwark.integrationSubtitle: Bulwark adapts to your agent architecture. Local development, remote multi-agent systems, or legacy HTTP clients — one governance layer handles all.
bulwark.rustSubtitle: A modular Rust workspace where each security boundary is its own crate — independently testable, auditable, and replaceable.
bulwark.approachDescription: Bulwark represents Honto's philosophy in practice: production-grade AI infrastructure built with engineering discipline. Every design decision prioritizes security, auditability, and operational reliability.
bulwark.approachStep1Desc: Mapped every attack surface where AI agents interact with sensitive systems — payments, compliance, privacy, and credentials.
bulwark.approachStep2Desc: Designed a pipeline where agents never directly access secrets or tools. Every interaction is mediated, inspected, and logged.
bulwark.approachStep3Desc: 10 independent crates, each owning a security boundary. 487 unit tests ensure correctness at every layer.
bulwark.approachStep4Desc: Apache 2.0 licensed. Transparent, auditable, and community-driven — because security tools must be verifiable.
bulwark.ctaDescription: Bulwark is open-source and ready to deploy. For enterprise deployments, custom policy design, or integration support — Honto's engineering team is here to help.

engram.title: Engram
engram.subtitle: Knowledge compiler and query engine for AI agent memory
engram.description: AI agents forget everything between sessions. Engram transforms Markdown files with YAML frontmatter into a BM25-searchable index with multi-tier caching, causal graph traversal, temporal queries, and governance controls. One knowledge base powers all your agents.
engram.challengeDescription: When AI agents operate across sessions, projects, and teams, they lose context constantly. Every conversation starts from zero. Institutional knowledge stays trapped in individual interactions, never compounding into organizational intelligence.
engram.problemNoMemoryDetail: Each agent session starts blank. Prior decisions, context, and accumulated knowledge vanish the moment a session ends.
engram.problemNoSearchDetail: Even when context exists in files, agents have no way to search, rank, or retrieve the most relevant knowledge for a given query.
engram.problemNoCausalityDetail: Agents cannot trace cause-and-effect chains across knowledge entries. Understanding why something happened requires manual reconstruction.
engram.problemNoGovernanceDetail: Any agent can access any knowledge. No per-agent, per-domain, or per-operation access controls exist to protect sensitive organizational context.
engram.capabilitiesSubtitle: Every query flows through a multi-tier pipeline. Each tier adds progressively deeper understanding.
engram.capCompilerDesc: Parses Markdown with YAML frontmatter, validates 19 structured fields, and compiles into a Tantivy full-text search index. Watch mode enables incremental compilation as knowledge evolves.
engram.capCacheDesc: Exact match cache (MD5, 60s TTL), fuzzy cache (Jaccard similarity at 0.6 threshold), and generation-aware invalidation ensure fast, consistent query responses.
engram.capSearchDesc: Multi-field search with configurable boosts — title 3x, tags 2x, domain tags 1.5x. Compound scoring combines BM25, confidence, importance, and recency.
engram.capCausalDesc: Traverses cause-and-effect relationships up to 6 hops deep. Triggered automatically by causal signal words like 'caused by', 'leads to', 'why did'.
engram.capTemporalDesc: CurrentState, SinceTimestamp, and EventHistory patterns. Automatically triggered by keywords like 'current', 'latest', 'since', and 'history'.
engram.capLlmDesc: Opt-in Tier 3 that fires when search scores fall below threshold. Synthesizes answers from retrieved knowledge using Claude, with full governance controls.
engram.architectureSubtitle: Every knowledge query flows through a deterministic, cached, and auditable pipeline — from exact match to LLM synthesis.
engram.pipelineResponseNote: Each tier short-circuits when a high-confidence result is found — most queries resolve at Tier 0 or 1.
engram.integrationSubtitle: Engram adapts to your agent workflow. Direct CLI, Claude Code plugin, or existing ByteRover corpora — one knowledge engine handles all.
engram.rustSubtitle: A modular Rust workspace where each concern is its own crate — knowledge compilation, query execution, governance, and agent integration.
engram.approachDescription: Engram represents Honto's commitment to AI systems that compound knowledge over time. Every design decision prioritizes retrieval accuracy, query performance, and governance.
engram.approachStep1Desc: Defined 19 structured frontmatter fields covering fact types, confidence levels, causal links, temporal metadata, and domain tags.
engram.approachStep2Desc: Designed a query pipeline that balances speed and depth — exact cache for repeated queries, BM25 for discovery, causal graphs for understanding.
engram.approachStep3Desc: 6 independent crates, each owning a capability boundary. 513 tests across 16 integration files ensure correctness at every layer.
engram.approachStep4Desc: Built to be transparent, extensible, and community-driven. Full compatibility with existing ByteRover knowledge corpora.
engram.ctaDescription: Engram is open-source and ready to deploy. For enterprise knowledge systems, custom ontology design, or integration support — Honto's engineering team is here to help.

opsai.subtitle: honto.ops captures knowledge from documents, reports, chats, and real operations — and makes it instantly accessible across your entire organization.
opsai.valueProp1: Ask questions and get answers grounded in your company's knowledge
opsai.valueProp2: Access expertise through chat, reports, documents, and multimedia
opsai.valueProp3: Preserve and scale decades of operational experience
opsai.problemDescription: The knowledge exists — it's just scattered across formats, systems, and people. Every time an engineer retires, changes roles, or is simply unavailable, critical operational intelligence walks out the door.
opsai.problemPdfsDetail: Manuals, procedures, and reports sit in folders no one revisits. Decades of operational wisdom trapped in static documents.
opsai.problemHeadsDetail: Your best decisions depend on who is available. When experts leave, their knowledge leaves with them.
opsai.problemChatsDetail: Critical context lives in WhatsApp chats, emails, and meetings. Impossible to search, impossible to scale.
opsai.problemSilosDetail: Each well, each field, each team operates in isolation. Lessons learned in one operation never reach the next.
opsai.unifiedDescription: honto.ops doesn't just read documents — it unifies every form of knowledge your company generates into a single, searchable, operational system.
opsai.unifiedDocsDesc: Manuals, procedures, standards, technical reports — ingested, indexed, and connected.
opsai.unifiedChatsDesc: Chat logs, internal Q&A, meeting notes — captured and made searchable.
opsai.unifiedReportsDesc: Production reports, well logs, diagnostic analysis — structured and queryable.
opsai.unifiedVideoDesc: Field recordings, tutorial videos, operational walkthroughs — transcribed and indexed.
opsai.unifiedAudioDesc: Voice memos, podcast-style briefings, field audio — converted to searchable knowledge.
opsai.unifiedExpertDesc: Decision rationale, troubleshooting logic, heuristics — the 'why' behind expert choices, preserved.
opsai.accessDescription: Engineers and operators don't work in one place — neither should your knowledge. Same intelligence, different entry points.
opsai.accessDesktopDesc: Full operational control with advanced search, dashboards, and analytics.
opsai.accessChatDesc: Ask questions in natural language. Get answers in seconds, grounded in your data.
opsai.accessSlackDesc: Query your knowledge base without leaving your communication tools.
opsai.accessReportsDesc: Automated insights surfaced through scheduled reports and live dashboards.
opsai.accessOfflineDesc: Full functionality in the field, even without connectivity. Syncs when back online.
opsai.transformDescription: honto.ops doesn't just store files — it builds a system where every decision, every incident, and every expert insight compounds into organizational intelligence.
opsai.transformBefore3: Decisions depend on who is available
opsai.transformBefore4: Experience stays locked in individual memory
opsai.transformAfter3: Every engineer benefits from the best experts
opsai.transformAfter5: New hires access decades of experience on day one
opsai.oilgasDescription: Not a generic AI tool adapted for oil & gas. honto.ops is engineered from the ground up for petroleum operations — structured around your wells, your fields, your workflows.
opsai.oilgasDiagDesc: Analyze well performance, identify anomalies, and surface historical parallels from your entire operational history.
opsai.oilgasProdDesc: Data-driven recommendations grounded in your company's production data and best practices.
opsai.oilgasWorkoverDesc: Instant access to relevant procedures, past workover reports, and expert recommendations for your specific well conditions.
opsai.oilgasIncidentDesc: Root-cause analysis supported by historical incident data, cross-referenced across fields and operations.
opsai.oilgasUnitsDesc: Native understanding of bbl/d, psi, WOR, GOR, API gravity, and the units your teams use every day.
opsai.oilgasStandardsDesc: Built-in awareness of API, ISO, and SPE standards. Responses aligned with industry norms and regulatory requirements.
opsai.diffDescription: Generic AI tools read documents. honto.ops builds institutional memory for your company.
opsai.ctaDescription: honto.ops ensures that the knowledge your company builds over decades is never lost, always accessible, and continuously improving. Turn experience into a competitive advantage.
opsai.ctaBullet1: Never lost — knowledge preserved beyond any individual
opsai.ctaBullet2: Always accessible — any team, any location, any device
opsai.ctaBullet3: Continuously improving — every operation makes the system smarter

platformArchitecture.description: honto is a private, enterprise-grade AI platform built on three integrated components — a workstation people use, an orchestrator that makes AI actions safe, and a private cloud foundation that keeps your data sovereign.
platformArchitecture.opsDescription: The interface where every person in your organization interacts with AI, documents, and connected systems through natural language.
platformArchitecture.wholoDescription: Converts APIs and databases into safe, agent-usable actions with full traceability and policy-based execution.
platformArchitecture.infraCompliance: SOC 2 Type II program in progress · ISO 27001 controls in implementation · Full data sovereignty — your data never leaves your private environment.

platform.heroSubtitle: honto brings the full power of AI to every person in your organization — employees, directors, contractors, providers, and investors — without dedicated AI teams, long implementations, or your data ever leaving your private environment.
platform.problemDescription: ERP, CRM, project management, document repositories, SCADA, databases, communication tools — every day, teams switch tools, copy-paste data, and lose context. AI promises to fix this, but most solutions require months of implementation, dedicated ML teams, and raise serious data privacy concerns.
platform.problem1Desc: Teams switch between a dozen interfaces to complete a single workflow. Each tool is its own learning curve and its own data silo.
platform.problem2Desc: Copy-paste between systems just to cross-reference information. Hours wasted on work the systems should do themselves.
platform.problem3Desc: When experienced employees leave, decades of institutional knowledge leave with them. Onboarding starts from zero every time.
platform.problem4Desc: No one is watching every system simultaneously. Blockers, anomalies, and risks surface only when it's too late.
platform.problem5Desc: Weekly reports that should take minutes consume entire afternoons because the data lives across five places.
platform.problem6Desc: Top performers' methods live in their heads, not in the system. Mistakes get repeated across teams that never compared notes.
platform.problem7Desc: Off-the-shelf AI tools mean shipping your operational data to someone else's servers. For most enterprises, that's a non-starter.
platform.solutionDescription: honto eliminates these barriers with a workstation people actually use, an orchestrator that makes AI actions safe, and a private cloud foundation engineered for AI workloads — all running in your environment.
platform.opsSubtitle: Where every person in the organization meets AI.
platform.opsDescription: honto.ops is a cross-platform desktop application (Electron + React) backed by a FastAPI service. Every user gets a personalized console — My Space — that aggregates everything relevant to their role into a single interface.
platform.opsMySpaceDesc: Every user has a personalized console aggregating everything that matters for their role.
platform.opsFeatureTasksDesc: All assigned tasks across connected project tools (Jira, Plane, Asana), AI-prioritized.
platform.opsFeatureDocsDesc: Personal and shared documents with AI search and Q&A — always with source citations.
platform.opsFeatureMessagesDesc: Notifications and communications from connected systems and team members.
platform.opsFeatureApprovalsDesc: Pending items requiring the user's review or sign-off, surfaced proactively.
platform.opsFeatureProjectsDesc: Active projects with status, members, deadlines, and AI-generated insights.
platform.opsFeaturePlaybooksDesc: Operational workflows the user owns or participates in — reusable, automated processes.
platform.opsFeatureKpisDesc: Live metrics pulled from connected data sources, personalized per role.
platform.opsFeatureConnectorsDesc: Status of all integrated systems with health indicators.
platform.opsFeatureModulesDesc: Domain modules per role — Safety for HSE, Procurement for buyers, and so on.
platform.opsChatTitle: AI chat — one interface for everything
platform.opsChatDesc: The core interaction model is a natural-language chat that assembles tools at runtime from every connected source. No manual tool selection.
platform.opsChatBullet1: Query any connected system — "Show me all open tickets assigned to the field team."
platform.opsChatBullet2: Take actions across systems — "Create a maintenance ticket in Jira and notify ops on Slack."
platform.opsChatBullet3: Analyze documents with clickable citations — "What does the safety manual say about high-pressure valves?"
platform.opsChatBullet4: Generate dashboards on demand — "Build a dashboard of production KPIs for last quarter."
platform.opsChatBullet5: Create executable workflows — "Every safety alert: check the sensor, file a ticket, notify HSE."
platform.opsChatBullet6: Get recommendations — "What equipment is most likely to need service this month?"
platform.opsPlaybooksDesc: Describe an operational process in natural language. honto structures it into a reusable playbook with triggers, conditions, and automated actions. No drag-and-drop builder. No code.
platform.opsPlaybooksUserSays: When a critical pressure reading comes in from SCADA, I need someone to check the sensor calibration log, create a maintenance ticket, notify the operations lead, and update the equipment status dashboard.
platform.opsPlaybooksTrigger: Webhook from SCADA on critical pressure alert
platform.opsDocsDesc: Upload any document — PDF, Word, Excel, PowerPoint, plain text — and the platform handles the rest.
platform.opsDocsBullet1: Indexed into the knowledge base with vector embeddings.
platform.opsDocsBullet2: Answers come with clickable citations linking to the exact source passage.
platform.opsDocsBullet4: Document knowledge is available to all chat interactions and automated workflows.
platform.wholoSubtitle: Makes AI actions safe, traceable, and deterministic.
platform.wholoDescription: honto.ops is what users see. honto.wholograph is what makes things happen reliably behind the scenes — the execution engine that turns natural-language intent into typed, validated, auditable action sequences across every connected system.
platform.wholoFlowInputExample: "Update the customer record and notify the team"
platform.wholoFlowOutputExamples: CRM API · ERP · Slack · Jira · SCADA · SAP · …any API or DB
platform.wholoCap1Desc: Point at an OpenAPI spec or database — honto.wholograph automatically discovers operations and creates typed, validated actions.
platform.wholoCap2Desc: Turns a 200-endpoint API into 15–20 curated, risk-scored, agent-safe actions. The AI only sees what it should.
platform.wholoCap3Desc: Every action has a risk level. Destructive actions are blocked by default. Policies define what auto-executes vs. what requires human approval.
platform.wholoCap4Desc: Same input → same output, always. No randomness, no silent retries, no partial execution.
platform.wholoCap5Desc: Every execution produces a complete trace artifact — what was planned, what was executed, inputs, outputs, durations. Replayable and verifiable.
platform.wholoCap6Desc: Natural-language intents are decomposed into ordered action sequences. Each step's output feeds the next step's input.
platform.wholoLayer1Role: Deterministic pipeline: discover → compile → resolve → validate → build → curate. Produces the action catalog and exposes the Capability Surface.
platform.wholoLayer2Role: Thin layer that handles natural-language intents: plan against the action surface, evaluate policies, execute through the lifecycle.
platform.wholoLayer3Role: Domain-specific capability expansion built on T1 primitives.
platform.wholoLayer4Role: Bounded agents in verifiable domains that reuse the same runtime contracts.
platform.infraSubtitle: AI-optimized infrastructure with full data sovereignty.
platform.infraDescription: Everything runs on private, AI-optimized cloud infrastructure built on a Rust foundation. There is no shared infrastructure, no data mingling with other tenants, no third-party access.
platform.infraStack1Desc: High-performance, memory-safe execution at every layer of the stack.
platform.infraStack2Desc: Blazing-fast Rust-native full-text search for every document and conversation.
platform.infraStack3Desc: Infrastructure tuned for inference and embedding workloads — not retrofitted from generic hosting.
platform.infraStack4Desc: Specialized AI infrastructure provider, deployed inside your private environment.
platform.infraWhyDesc: Your documents, conversations, system credentials, and AI interactions never leave your private environment. AI models can run locally with Ollama or through private provider endpoints — your call.
platform.diffDescription: Four things make honto different from any AI you can buy off a shelf.
platform.diff1Desc: Your data stays in your infrastructure, period.
platform.diff1Bullet1: Private AI — your data never leaves your environment
platform.diff1Bullet2: SOC 2 Type II program in progress
platform.diff1Bullet4: Encrypted at rest and in transit; local LLMs available via Ollama
platform.diff2Desc: honto comes ready to use, not ready to build.
platform.diff2Bullet3: No ML expertise needed — embeddings, retrieval, and orchestration are handled
platform.diff2Bullet4: Plug-and-play connectors — point at an OpenAPI spec, the system self-configures
platform.diff3Title: All your tools in one place
platform.diff3Desc: A single conversation can reach every system you run.
platform.diff3Bullet1: Unified AI interface across every enterprise system
platform.diff3Bullet2: Cross-system workflows in one chat — CRM, Jira, docs, Slack
platform.diff3Bullet3: No more copy-paste — the AI moves data between systems for you
platform.diff3Bullet4: Runtime tool assembly — new connections become available instantly
platform.diff4Desc: Natural language is the only interface anyone has to learn.
platform.diff4Bullet2: Role-based personalization — each user sees what's relevant
platform.diff4Bullet3: Multi-language — write in any language, AI responds in kind
platform.diff4Bullet4: Conversation-driven configuration — even workflow creation happens in chat
platform.intelSubtitle: honto doesn't just respond. It watches your systems, replicates your best practices, and surfaces what matters before it becomes a problem.
platform.bestPracticeDesc: honto tracks performance based on hard metrics — not opinions, not self-reports — and turns top performers' methods into recommendations everyone can follow.
platform.bestPractice1Desc: By analyzing task completion rates, response times, quality metrics, and outcomes across connected systems.
platform.bestPractice2Desc: What do your best people do differently? Which sequences of actions lead to better outcomes?
platform.bestPractice3Desc: Specific, data-driven recommendations to other team members based on proven practices.
platform.bestPractice4Desc: Tracks whether suggested improvements actually move the needle.
platform.watchmanDesc: Continuously monitors connected systems to surface issues before they become crises.
platform.watchman1Desc: Identifies stuck tasks, stalled approvals, and bottlenecked processes across every connected system.
platform.watchman2Desc: Analyzes company rules, procedures, and historical resolutions to recommend the best path forward.
platform.watchman3Desc: Notifies the right people when something needs attention — not after it's a problem, but before.
platform.watchman4Desc: Ensures processes follow documented rules, flagging deviations before they escalate.
platform.watchman5Desc: Tracks patterns over time — degrading response times, ticket pile-ups, recurring blockers.
platform.usersDescription: honto is not for a single department. Every person gets the same private AI workstation — scoped to what they need.
platform.user1Desc: A personal AI assistant that knows the company's systems, documents, and rules. Complete tasks faster, get answers instantly, automate repetitive work.
platform.user2Desc: Real-time visibility through AI-generated dashboards. Proactive alerts on blockers and risks. Data-driven team performance insights.
platform.user3Desc: Scoped access to relevant projects and systems with the same AI-powered efficiency, without exposing internal data.
platform.user4Desc: Secure, controlled interaction with specific company systems through defined workflows and approval policies.
platform.user5Desc: Transparent, AI-powered reporting on operational metrics, milestones, and company health — always up to date, always auditable.
platform.industriesSubtitle: honto's connector model means it adapts to whatever stack your industry runs on.
platform.industry1UseCases: Well monitoring, safety playbooks, maintenance workflows, production reports, compliance tracking
platform.industry2UseCases: Customer operations, compliance monitoring, report generation, cross-system audit trails
platform.industry3UseCases: Work orders, equipment monitoring, quality workflows, inventory optimization
platform.industry4UseCases: Asset management, outage response, field crew coordination, regulatory reporting
platform.industry5UseCases: Project tracking, procurement workflows, safety incidents, resource allocation
platform.industry6UseCases: Employee onboarding playbooks, performance tracking, client management, resource planning
platform.techSubtitle: Every layer of honto is built with the same engineering discipline — Rust where it matters, Python where it's pragmatic, and a plugin system that makes the platform extensible without forks.
platform.tech1Purpose: API server, RAG pipeline, chat engine, plugin system
platform.tech8Purpose: AI-optimized compute with full data sovereignty
platform.tech9Purpose: Auto-discovered extensions for RAG, connectors, and AI capabilities
platform.deploySubtitle: From provisioning to your team working in the workstation — without months-long implementation cycles.
platform.deployStep1Desc: Private cloud environment on OrtCloud. Rust runtime, Tantivy, and AI compute provisioned to your specs.
platform.deployStep2Desc: Set up tenant, users, roles, and AI providers. Choose models — local Ollama or private cloud endpoints.
platform.deployStep3Desc: Upload OpenAPI specs for APIs, connect databases, configure integrations (Slack, Jira, SAP, SCADA), upload documents.
platform.deployStep4Desc: Set up projects, assign teams, enable skills. Configure KPI dashboards per role. Define approval policies and guardrails.
platform.deployStep5Desc: Users open their workstation. AI is immediately available across every connected system from day one.
platform.securityHeading: We don't let AI touch your data directly.
platform.securitySubheading: Every access is policy-enforced, fully traced, and compliant by design.
platform.securityDescription: honto is built with the assumption that your data is the most sensitive thing in the building. The platform sits between users, AI, and your systems — every interaction passes through controls you own.
platform.security1Impl: All data stays in your private cloud — no shared infrastructure, no third-party access
platform.security2Impl: Program in progress — controls implemented, audit underway
platform.security3Impl: Information security management system controls in implementation
platform.security4Impl: AES-256 at rest, TLS 1.3 in transit. All credentials encrypted before storage.
platform.security5Impl: Super admin, tenant admin, and user roles with project-level scoping
platform.security6Impl: Every AI action traced, recorded, and replayable through honto.wholograph
platform.security7Impl: Configurable approval policies — what auto-executes vs. what needs human sign-off
platform.security8Impl: Each client gets fully isolated data, configurations, and system connections
platform.security9Impl: Run models entirely on-premises with Ollama — zero external API calls
platform.ctaDescription: Book a discovery call. We'll show you exactly how honto fits into your stack, and what it would take to get your team working in a private AI workstation.
platform.ctaBullet2: Custom assessment of your connected systems
